title: Create a 3D Model of a Molecule for Educational Purposes
scenario: Design a 3D model of a molecule that showcases its structure and chemical bonds. The model should be interactive, allowing users to rotate and zoom in on specific atoms. Include a legend to explain the different atomic elements and their corresponding colors. The model should be optimized for web use and meet the specified file size constraint.
constraints: Must have a maximum file size of 1MB

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the 3D model adhere to the specified constraints?
Is the 3D model easy to understand and navigate?
Does the 3D model allow users to interact with it and view specific atoms?
Does the 3D model meet the specified file size constraint?
